Order Large Outdoor Banner Frames for Event Displays

Our large outdoor banner frames provide professional display solutions for events, trade shows, and outdoor advertising installations. These lightweight yet durable aluminum frames feature a portable design that sets up quickly for any display application.

Banner Frame Features & Benefits

  • Lightweight aluminum construction for easy transport and setup
  • Ball bungee attachment system for secure banner mounting
  • Professional-grade hardware designed for repeated use
  • Compact carrying case included for convenient storage
  • Compatible with custom vinyl banners and fabric displays

Display Specifications

  • Frame Dimensions: 100.75" W x 38" H x 24.75" D
  • Case Dimensions: 49.25" x 4.25" H x 10.25" D
  • Total Weight: 15.25 lbs for easy portability
  • Setup Time: Under 5 minutes assembly

Perfect for outdoor events, trade shows, retail displays, and temporary signage installations. Banner sold separately to accommodate your specific design requirements.

Banner Frame Material & Construction Details

Our large outdoor banner frames are constructed from premium aluminum tubing designed to withstand outdoor conditions while maintaining portability for event use.

Frame Construction Materials

  • Aluminum Tubing: Corrosion-resistant finish for outdoor durability
  • Steel Connectors: Reinforced joints for stability and repeated assembly
  • Ball Bungee Hardware: UV-resistant elastic cords with secure ball attachments
  • Protective Case: Heavy-duty nylon carrying case with reinforced handles

Weather Resistance Features

  • Powder-coated aluminum finish resists rust and corrosion
  • Wind-resistant design rated for moderate outdoor conditions
  • All hardware components tested for UV exposure
  • Water-resistant carrying case protects components during transport

Compatible Banner Materials

  • 13oz vinyl banners with reinforced hems and grommets

Professional Applications for Large Outdoor Banner Frames

Large outdoor banner frames serve multiple industries and applications, providing versatile display solutions for temporary and semi-permanent installations.

Event & Trade Show Applications

  • Trade Show Displays: Professional booth backgrounds and promotional displays
  • Outdoor Events: Festival signage and vendor display systems
  • Corporate Events: Company branding and directional signage
  • Sporting Events: Sponsor displays and team identification banners

Business & Retail Uses

  • Grand Openings: Temporary promotional displays for new businesses
  • Sales Events: Eye-catching displays for special promotions
  • Construction Sites: Company identification and safety messaging
  • Real Estate: Property marketing and open house displays

Institutional Applications

  • Schools & Universities: Campus event promotion and wayfinding
  • Government Agencies: Public information and awareness campaigns
  • Non-Profit Organizations: Fundraising events and awareness displays
  • Healthcare Facilities: Health fairs and community outreach events

Installation Environments

  • Concrete surfaces with weighted base systems
  • Grass and soft ground with stake-down options
  • Indoor venues for trade shows and exhibitions
  • Parking lots and outdoor event spaces

Banner Frame Advantages

Reusable hardware system reduces long-term display costs. Quick setup and breakdown saves labor time. Professional appearance enhances brand presentation. Portable design enables use across multiple locations.

Banner Design Requirements for Frame Installation

Proper banner design and specifications ensure optimal display performance with your large outdoor banner frame hardware system.

Banner Dimensions & Specifications

  • Recommended Banner Size: 96" W x 36" H (allows 2" border for frame clearance)
  • Maximum Banner Size: 100" W x 38" H for full frame coverage
  • Bleed Area: Add 1" bleed on all sides for optimal appearance
  • Safe Zone: Keep important text 3" from banner edges

Grommet & Attachment Specifications

  • Grommet Size: #4 brass grommets (1/2" inner diameter)
  • Grommet Spacing: Every 18-24" along top and bottom edges
  • Corner Grommets: Reinforced corners with double-sewn hems
  • Side Attachment: Optional grommets every 24" on vertical edges

File Format Requirements

  • Vector Files: AI, EPS, or PDF with embedded fonts
  • Raster Images: High-resolution TIFF or PSD files
  • Resolution: Minimum 150 DPI at actual print size
  • Color Mode: CMYK color profile for accurate printing

Design Considerations for Outdoor Display

  • Bold fonts and high contrast colors for distance viewing
  • Wind-resistant design with reinforced attachment points
  • UV-resistant inks for extended outdoor exposure
  • Simplified messaging for quick comprehension

Banner Material Recommendations

13oz vinyl banners provide optimal durability for frame mounting. Mesh banners recommended for high-wind locations. Fabric banners offer premium appearance for indoor/outdoor events. All materials available with custom printing and grommet installation.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Banner Frame Hardware FAQ

How long does banner frame assembly take?

Complete frame assembly typically takes under 5 minutes with included instructions. All connection points are clearly marked, and no tools are required for standard setup.

What banner materials work with this frame system?

The frame accommodates vinyl banners, mesh banners, and fabric displays with standard grommets. Banner weight should not exceed 10 pounds for optimal display stability.

Can the frame withstand outdoor weather conditions?

The aluminum frame is designed for moderate outdoor use with powder-coated finish for corrosion resistance. For high-wind conditions, use weighted bases or ground stakes for additional stability.

Is the carrying case included with frame orders?

Yes, every frame includes a heavy-duty nylon carrying case with reinforced handles and protective padding for component storage and transport.

Can multiple frames be connected for larger displays?

Yes, frames can be positioned side-by-side for extended banner displays. Connection hardware available separately for permanent multi-frame installations.

What's the weight capacity for banner attachment?

Maximum recommended banner weight is 10 pounds. Standard vinyl banners in the recommended size typically weigh 6-8 pounds with grommets and reinforced hems.

Are replacement parts available for the frame system?

Yes, replacement ball bungees, frame connectors, and hardware components are available. Contact customer service for specific replacement part pricing and availability.

Can the frame be used indoors for trade shows?

Absolutely. The frame system works excellent for indoor trade shows, exhibitions, and retail displays. No special setup modifications required for indoor use.
